hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // ""' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */types/presentation.ts) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"IMPORTANT: src/types/presentation.ts was just modified. Check if LLM-EDITING.md needs to be updated to match the new types. Update it if any element types, fields, presets, or the Slide/Presentation structure changed."}}' ;; esac; }
hooks.statusMessage: Checking if LLM editing guide needs update...
